questions.question: According to the lecture (Slide 14): which is accurate?
options:
Conscious Sedation

The administration of IV drugs to a patient to impair consciousness but retain protective ...
This applies only to adult patients.
This is not a standard consideration.
This is contradicted by current guidelines.
questions.rationale:
Slide 14: Conscious Sedation

The administration of IV drugs to a patient to impair consciousness but retain protective reflexes, the ability to maintain a patent airway, and the ability to respond to physical and verbal stimuli

questions.question: According to the lecture (Slide 17): which is accurate?
options:
Intercultural Communication: Responses to Hospitalization
Approaches to various cultures involve knowing what ...
This applies only to adult patients.
This is not a standard consideration.
This is contradicted by current guidelines.
questions.rationale:
Slide 17: Intercultural Communication: Responses to Hospitalization
Approaches to various cultures involve knowing what is and is not acceptable as it relates to
Personal space
Smiling
Eye contact
Touch
Focus
It is important for the nurse to take the time to become familiar with culturally acceptable behaviors

questions.rationale:
Slide 19: The Nurse’s Role in Hospital Admission
Must be prepared to meet the emotional needs of those involved
Parents should try to be as matter-of-fact as possible about this new experience for their child

Slide 22: Adjustment to Illness
